summary: Non-functional deliverable: workflow references missing Invoke-ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 (will crash at line 1 of test job) and .actrc; no act-result.txt generated. PowerShell code itself is solid (Set-StrictMode, proper param validation, correct datetime/size logic, good error handling), but the system cannot execute. Run-ActHarness has good design (data-driven test cases, regex parsing, failure tracking), but can't run without test file. Missing actionlint validation output.
